characters.description: Baby BearVoice ActorsWarren McAlister(Season 1)Nissae Isen(Season 3) Baby Bearis the youngest of the three bears from the story/episodeGoldilocks and the Three Bears, where he met a blonde-haired girl named Goldilocks.

characters.name: Big Bad Wolf
characters.description: TheBig Bad Wolfis a character that first appeared inThe Three Little Pigs. He appears again inThe Three Little Pigs: Return of the Wolf,Muddled Up Fairytales,The Big GameandThe Story of the Super Readers. He is voiced byRichard Binsleyin the US and Canada andDavid Holtin the UK.

characters.name: Briny Bart
characters.description: Briny Bart the mean pirate of the world! Briny Bartis an old man villain pirate appearing in the episodeThe Beach Day Mystery, along withPiperandPascaland his parrot. He angrily appears and shouts at Piper and Pascal and they get so scared when he shouts really loud. Compared to Piper and Pascal, Briny Bart speaks a lot more about giving clues to Piper and Pascal that they don't understand. Briny Bart tells Piper and Pascal they'll never figure the clues out and shouts never. He also runs two times after giving wrong clues to Piper and Pascal. Super Why and the Super Readers couldn't know about Briny Bart giving wrong clues. He also runs away and cackles after Piper and Pascal read the sentence in the story. He runs for the last time after giving Piper and Pascal the right clue without cackling. Briny Bart appears everywhere in the story. In the beginning, he appears from the bush. In the middle, he appears from another bush. Before the end, he appears from the trees.

characters.name: Cinderella
characters.description: Age: 14 Gender: At first, Cinderella was uncomfortable with herself when she wished to attend a special party being held by thePrince, but eventually she learned to stop worrying about that and just love herself and have fun! No matter how different she may seem to others. This advice helpedRedas well, who feared she wouldn't fit in at Sleeping Beauty's Princess Party she was invited to attend.

characters.name: Cricket
characters.description: Cricket is a character who appeares in the episode, "Pinocchio". He is, in a sense,Pinocchio'sconcious and tries to get him to do the right thing, and even cheer him on when he is about to. Much likeGepetto, he was disappointed when Pinocchio would lie or do something wrong/bad. He also seems to be somewhat clumsy. Cricket was voiced byEddie Glen As said, Cricket appeared in due time when Pinocchio kept lying. Their relationship is unknown but Cricket does not like to see Pinocchio lie or cause trouble. He is very eager, perky, and excited. Offering to cheer Pinocchio on when he was going to attempt to tell Gepetto the truth about his wooden doll. Also, Cricket seems to be somewhat clumsy.
characters.personality_section: As said, Cricket appeared in due time when Pinocchio kept lying. Their relationship is unknown but Cricket does not like to see Pinocchio lie or cause trouble. characters.description: TheFrog Princeis a storybook character as himself fromhis story, one of the Heroes inThe Big Game, and as a one-shot character inMuddled Up Fairytales.

characters.name: Gepetto
characters.description: Gepetto is a kind, wise, adult appearing in the story"Pinocchio". He is the father ofPinocchioand runs a Toy Shop where he makes plenty of wooden based toys. Like baseball bats and puppets or dolls. But he also sells things like stuffed cat dolls. He first met the Super Readers when he came in to see what all the noise was in his workshop and kept trying to get Pinocchio to confess that he was the one to break his items. Everytime Pinocchio would lie his nose would grow, only after Gepetto would leave the room. Pinocchio finally admitted to his crime and felt much better after doing so, along with pleasing his dad. Geppetto is voiced byRay Landry. Gepetto is a kind and caring father. He never loses his temper with Pinocchio, even upon finding out that the small child did lie to him. He kept becoming disappointed however and implied plenty of times during the episode that he even knew that Pinocchio was indeed responsible for breaking the items. Though he did admit to be upset, when Pinocchio finally confessed. He admitted to feeling much better, as did Pinocchio, and did not punish the wooden child.

characters.name: Girl dressed as Witch

characters.name: Goldilocks
characters.description: GoldilocksSeason 3Season 1StorybookVoice ActorsMichelle Soicher(Season 1-2)Julie Sype(Season 3)Goldilocks(born August 28, 1991) is a middle teenager and the eldest girl who lives inStorybook Village. Often, she is seen taking care, or playing with, Baby Bear and Joy Beanstalk (occasionally). She is one of the kickball participants. She is also the porridge race coach. As said, when she first appeared, Goldilocks was only concerned with having fun and playing around or just goofing off. She didn't bother to reconsider her actions until realizing she had made such a mess of the three bears home and they were very unhappy about it. So, in hopes of making up with them, Goldilocks had helped to clean it up and she has apologized for her mistake. Since then, she has matured in a more thoughtful girl. She doesn't seem to be childish at all and isn't as careless. She is often seen playing with Baby Bear and may babysit him due to her now friendly relationship with the entire bear family. As said, when she first appeared, Goldilocks was only concerned with having fun and playing around or just goofing off. She didn't bother to reconsider her actions until realizing she had made such a mess of the three bears home and they were very unhappy about it. So, in hopes of making up with them, Goldilocks had helped to clean it up and she has apologized for her mistake. Since then, she has matured in a more thoughtful girl. She doesn't seem to be childish at all and isn't as careless. She is often seen playing with Baby Bear and may babysit him due to her now friendly relationship with the entire bear family. Goldilocks is also very smart and just a teensy bit sensitive when she is wrongly accused of things. To the point of hiding instead of facing the problem head on if she lacks any proof that can help her prove her innocence. She may also be a friend ofPrincess Pea'sas she offered her popcorn inSnow White, and a ride in the bouncy castle inLandon's Circus Adventure. She may also be a friend ofJack Beanstalk, Whyatt’s brother, since in the episodeThe Magic Porridge Pot, they had a picnic together.

characters.name: Grandma
characters.description: GrandmaAgeOldVoice ActorsPatricia GageMarcia BennettGrandma isRed Riding Hood’sgrandmother. She lives a few miles away from Red. Red cares deeply for her to live with her new friends. Her grandmother is Red’s only known relative. She is first seen in “The Three Billy Goats Gruff” and also appears in “Juan Bobo and the Pig”, “Peter Rabbit”, “Dr. Dolittle”, “Hansel and Gretel: A Healthy Adventure”, “Muddled Up Fairytales”, “The Story of Mother Goose”, “Webby in Bathland”, “Jasper’s Cowboy Wish”, “Judith’s Happy Chanukah”, and “Comic Book: Attack of More Man!.”

characters.name: Jill
characters.description: JillVoice ActorsIsabel de Carteret(Season 1)Kira Gelineau(Season 3)Alexandra Bierer(UK) Jillis a resident ofStorybrook Village. She is from the nursery rhyme "Jack and Jill". However,JackfromJack and the Beanstalkcould join her. She is one of the kickball and sack race participants. She never speaks in season 2. Jill is a light-skinned young girl with brown hair tied up in pigtails with pink ribbons. She has brown eyes and wears a blue dress with a pink strap around it. Her footwear consists of white socks and pink mary janes. She is usually seen holding a red pail.

characters.name: Little Boy Blue
characters.description: From the episode “The Swiss Family Robinson”: Little Boy Blue is stuck because his raft broke apart. Little Boy Blue is a character who likes blue.  He has black hair along with glasses. Also, he is from the famous nursery rhyme of the same name. He is believed to be friends withLittle Red Riding Hood (Red). This is revealed in “Little Miss Muffet”. He loves to play the trumpet.

characters.name: Pig
characters.actor_name: Zachary Bloch(Seasons 1-2)Samuel Faraci(Season 3)TBA (Comic Book Adventures)Alexander Hards(UK)
characters.description: Littlest PigPig (S3)Pig (S1-S2)Alpha Pig (S3)Alpha Pig (S1-S2)Age8 (Before The Magic Porridge Pot)9 (Rest of series)Voice ActorsZachary Bloch(Seasons 1-2)Samuel Faraci(Season 3)TBA (Comic Book Adventures)Alexander Hards(UK) 9 (Rest of series) (Season 3)TBA (Comic Book Adventures)Alexander Hards(UK) Pig, like the other Super Readers, is very friendly and usually happy with a passive, gentle nature. He loves to play with others and can build almost anything, but it's easy to frustrate or upset him when dealing with a problem, even if it's not really a big deal. However, he is often a target of being bullied or harassed by others, on purpose or by accident. At first, Pig has trouble standing up for himself and shows cowardly streaks at times. But, with some help from his friends, he'll stand up for himself or anyone who may have been hurt in the process, and tell the person how he feels and how badly they acted. Pig also sometimes has problems dealing with the fact he's the youngest pig out of the three. His two older brothers often think he cannot do certain things and believe he is too little to do most things, such as adventuring or building a specific object. Because of this, they tend to generally ignore him. While he does come off a little nervous and easily frightened, Pig is always willing to lend a hand and cares very much when someone is in trouble!
